_comment: Parity/version-tracking manifest. Cursor plugin install is still script-driven (see plugins/controlflow-cursor/scripts/install-project.ps1 and sync-to-dotcursor.ps1); this file mirrors the codex/.codex-plugin and claude-code/.claude-plugin manifest convention for tooling parity and version tracking, and is not consumed as a runtime plugin descriptor by Cursor itself.
name: controlflow-cursor
description: ControlFlow workflow skills and agents for Cursor: spec capture, strict planning, plan audit, assumption verification, executability verification, orchestration discipline, evidence-backed review, and memory hygiene.
